presentation.title: ABOUT US
presentation.text1_short: Company based in Abidjan, founded in 2017, specializing in technology solutions for Africa.
presentation.text1: BUSINESS CANADA AFRICA TECHNOLOGIES LIMITED, abbreviated BCA TECHNOLOGIES LIMITED, is a company based in Abidjan, in the municipality of Cocody. Founded in 2017 by Mr. Gbran Georges Poiret ANGAHI, the company was born from an ambitious vision: to actively contribute to the technological development of the African continent through innovative solutions adapted to local realities.
presentation.text2: Specializing in the supply of telecom, IT, and electronic equipment, as well as security systems and various equipment, BCA TECHNOLOGIES LIMITED offers reliable and high-performance solutions for businesses, institutions, and individuals.
presentation.text3: Guided by values of excellence, innovation, and integrity, the company has positioned itself as a key player in the technology sector in Côte d'Ivoire, with strong sub-regional ambitions.
presentation.mission_text: To provide innovative and reliable technology solutions that foster digital development in Africa, bringing international-quality equipment accessible to local businesses.
presentation.vision_text: To become the reference technology partner in sub-Saharan Africa, connecting African businesses to the world's best technologies while developing local talent.
presentation.values_text: Excellence · Innovation · Integrity · Proximity · Commitment. These five pillars guide every decision and relationship with our clients, partners and collaborators.

telecom.title: Your fiber network, designed with precision, deployed with excellence
telecom.tagline: Your fiber network, designed with precision, deployed with excellence

subSections.title: Expertise & Engineering
items: Civil engineering studies and works: Site analysis and infrastructure preparation.
Design & Implementation: Complete project management of your connectivity projects.
Network Architecture: Design of reliable and transparent solutions for next-generation voice, video, and data service deployment.

subSections.title: Deployment & Infrastructure
items: Metropolitan Networks and Backbones: Large-scale deployment of structural fiber optic networks.
FTTx Solutions: Implementation of faster and more reliable networks (FTTH, FTTB, FTTC, FTTN).
GPON & POL Technologies: Creation of Passive Optical LAN networks for optimal performance.
Hybrid Infrastructures: Integration of fiber, xDSL, or mixed architectures to reach millions of homes.

subSections.title: Maintenance & Performance
items: Preventive and Corrective Maintenance: Rigorous monitoring of optical transport networks to ensure maximum availability.
High-Precision Testing and Measurement: Use of EXFO equipment for intelligent, automated, and field-tested solutions.
Quality Optimization: Guarantee of a high quality level for all your transport and distribution infrastructures.

it.title: Your security, our commitment
it.tagline: Professional security solutions — Electronic Security Expertise

subSections.title: Intelligent Video Surveillance (CCTV)
items: Installation of high-definition IP cameras (4K) with integrated video analytics.
Line crossing detection, abandoned object detection, and facial recognition.
Hybrid storage solutions (local NVR and secure Cloud).

subSections.title: High-Security Access Control
items: Biometric readers (fingerprints, palm or facial recognition).
RFID badge access management and smartphone unlocking solutions.
Centralized multi-site management for businesses and industrial complexes.

subSections.title: Alarm Systems and Intrusion Detection
items: Connected alarm panels with immediate video verification.
Perimeter sensors, dual-technology motion detectors, and infrared barriers.
Anti-assault systems and silent panic buttons.

subSections.title: Fire Safety and Technical Risks
items: Installation of certified smoke, heat, and carbon monoxide detectors.
System interlocking (automatic emergency exit opening, gas shutdown).
Preventive maintenance to ensure compliance with safety standards.

security.title: Connect, automate, control your environment
security.tagline: Smart and connected technologies — Intelligent Convergence Solutions

subSections.title: IoT Ecosystems (Internet of Things)
items: Integration and interconnection of smart sensors for automated management of your infrastructure.
Smart Building & Office: Transforming workspaces into connected environments to optimize productivity and reduce operational costs.
Unified Networks: Convergence of voice, data, and video streams onto a single, robust, and secure network infrastructure.
Connected Energy Management: Deployment of smart meters and monitoring systems for real-time control of your energy footprint.

subSections.title: User Interfaces and Experience
items: Centralized Dashboards: Global visualization of your systems' status (security, network, energy) on a single ergonomic interface.
Remote Control & Mobility: Full access to your facilities via secure mobile applications, wherever you are in the world.
Predictive Automation: Use of artificial intelligence to anticipate building needs (air conditioning, preventive maintenance).

subSections.title: High-Value-Added Services
items: Connectivity Audit: Analysis of your existing installations to identify modernization and technological optimization levers.
Deployment Engineering: End-to-end support, from feasibility study to commissioning of your connected solutions.
Technical Support & Managed Services: Proactive assistance to ensure service continuity for your smart technologies.

domotique.title: Technology serving your land
domotique.tagline: Smart Agriculture — Precision equipment controllable from a computer or smartphone
domotique.description: BCA Technologies supports agricultural producers and agro-industry with precision equipment controllable from a computer or smartphone:

subSections.title: 5-layer soil temperature and humidity sensors
items: Precise and continuous measurement of the water status of your plots at different depths.

subSections.title: Professional weather station
items: Real-time collection of local climate data to anticipate your crops' needs and adapt your interventions.

subSections.title: Optimal irrigation assisted by computer and smartphone
items: Automatic and intelligent irrigation control through cross-analysis of soil and weather data, to save water and maximize yields.

import.title: Import & Export
import.tagline: Access global markets with peace of mind
import.description: Leveraging its international roots, BCA Technologies facilitates your purchases in North America and Europe, managing the entire logistics chain: sourcing, customs clearance, transport, and B2B delivery in West Africa.

energy.title: Electrical Equipment
energy.tagline: Lighting and energy for all your projects
energy.description: Supply and installation of electrical equipment and lighting for residential or commercial projects. BCA Technologies offers low-consumption LED solutions and equipment compliant with applicable standards.

about.ceo_p1: Since the creation of BCA Technologies Limited in 2017, our ambition has always been the same: to actively contribute to Africa's digital transformation by bringing world-class technology solutions adapted to the continent's realities and needs.
about.ceo_p2: We chose not to simply distribute equipment, but to support our clients over the long term — from design to implementation, through to maintenance and the evolution of their infrastructures. This added value is what sets us apart and explains our 85% client renewal rate.
about.ceo_p3: Our vision for the coming years: strengthen our sub-regional presence, invest in training local talent, and continue innovating to position BCA Technologies as the reference technology partner in sub-Saharan Africa.
about.ceo_p4: I thank our entire team, our partners, and our clients for their trust, which allows us every day to take on new challenges with passion and commitment.
